Intro line before the floated sidebar.

Sidebar note one two three four five six seven eight nine ten eleven twelve.

Beside paragraph flows to the right of the tall float on the same rows next to it.

Cleared block drops below the left float rather than beside it.
Right aside alpha beta gamma delta epsilon zeta eta theta iota kappa lambda.

Body text beside the right float wraps in the remaining left channel here now.

Cleared-right block drops below the right float.
Leftpair one two three.
Rightpair one two three.

Middle channel text.

Clear-both block drops below both floats.
